children.title: P0 Build QM5_1014 lien-channels
children.body: Build and compile framework/EAs/QM5_1014_lien_channels/QM5_1014_lien_channels.mq5 from strategy-seeds/cards/lien-channels_card.md section 8 defaults. Deliver .ex5 and compile log evidence.

children.title: P1 Smoke QM5_1014 on Lien worked pairs
children.body: Run smoke for USDCAD.DWX M15 and EURGBP.DWX M15 once P0 artifacts exist. Publish summary.json/log paths.

children.title: P2 Baseline QM5_1014 queue cohort
children.body: Run baseline on 8 symbols x 5 timeframes from tools/ops/p3_next_candidates_queue.json using 5-terminal saturation profile. Publish report.csv and p2 result json.
